Home/Aseel date palms, selected at the source.

Khairpur’s signature variety

Aseel date palms, selected at the source.

Aseel is Khairpur’s signature date palm variety and one of the most recognised names in Pakistan’s date-growing tradition. Grown and selected in the nurseries around Khairpur Mirs, Sindh, Aseel date palms are valued for their strong root development, dependable growth and long commercial history in the region. Buyers can enquire about plants from approximately 1 ft through 20 ft — from young nursery stock suited to home gardens, to tall, established specimens for orchards and large landscape projects — subject to current nursery availability.

Enquire about Aseel →
Height rangeApproximately 1–20 ft
Best forFarms, orchards and landscapes
Quote basisHeight, quantity and destination
SupportSupply and installation

What buyers need to know

01

Who is it for?

Aseel suits a wide range of buyers: agricultural investors planting a commercial orchard, farmhouse owners wanting a statement entrance tree, landscape contractors working on residential or commercial projects, and government or institutional buyers planting avenues and public spaces. What connects them is a preference for a date palm with authentic Khairpur provenance rather than an unverified or mixed-origin plant.

  • Orchard enquiries
  • Statement landscape planting
  • Bulk and individual orders
  • Government and institutional planting
02

What affects the quotation?

Palm height alone is not enough to price a Khairpur Aseel date palm. Quantity, root-ball size, vehicle access at both the nursery and the delivery site, distance travelled, and whether installation is required all materially affect the final cost. A palm supplied only (no planting) will differ in price from one that includes machinery-assisted lifting, transport and professional planting at destination.

  • Required quantity
  • Delivery city and access
  • Supply-only or installation
  • Root-ball and handling requirements
03

Why Aseel from Khairpur specifically

Khairpur, Sindh is one of Pakistan’s most established date-growing regions, and the Aseel variety has been cultivated here across generations of local nurseries. Buying from the source means the plant has been raised in soil and climate conditions similar to where it will likely be replanted, which supports a smoother establishment period compared with palms sourced from unrelated growing regions.

  • Regional growing expertise
  • Climate-matched stock
  • Direct nursery relationship
04

Before you order

Ask for current stock imagery and confirm exactly how the quoted height is measured (from soil level to crown, or to leaf tip). For mature or fruit-bearing plants, fruiting history, gender and age should be confirmed for the specific tree where relevant, since these vary between individual palms even within the same variety.

  • Current-stock confirmation
  • Specification confirmation
  • Site information

Direct, structured enquiry
